error_signature: JSON arrays do not get properly parsed from HTTP requests
title: HTTP node fails to parse JSON arrays correctly
symptom: When receiving a JSON array from an HTTP request, the data is not parsed correctly, resulting in a string representation instead of a structured object.
applies_when: Using HTTP node to fetch JSON data
not_this_if: Response is not a JSON array
Data is parsed correctly in other nodes
root_cause: The HTTP node may not automatically parse JSON arrays if the response is formatted as a string. This can lead to issues where the expected structured data is not available for further processing in the workflow.
fix_steps: Enable the option to parse JSON responses
Re-run the workflow to check if the data is parsed correctly
agent_instruction: Enable JSON parsing in the HTTP node settings and save the workflow.
